untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking (1) multi-position portfolio state across 2+ consecutive stopouts within a window, and (2) regime classification (bull vs bear phase) — neither of which can be expressed as single-bar technical indicator conditions. The signal is inherently portfolio-level and regime-detection logic that exceeds single-instrument indicator algebra.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: (1) Leader weakness proxied as close < sma_20 or price_pos_20 < 0.5 (below middle of 20-day range); (2) Cannot encode: tracking consecutive individual position stops across portfolio, bull/bear regime detection, or the multi-position state required. This signal requires external portfolio management logic and regime classification outside indicator-based rules.
